description.p: MultiFlexi Executor is a systemd service daemon that polls the MultiFlexi database for scheduled jobs and executes them. It supports both one-shot execution for a given RunTemplate and continuous daemon mode for dispatching scheduled jobs automatically.
The executor captures job output, handles logging to syslog, database, and optionally Zabbix, and supports running tasks in Docker containers via the optional multiflexi-executor-docker package.
